title: Custom Auction House Sniper Addon
short_desc: Real-time scanning, alerts, and historical price tracking.
example_project: Built a sniper for a Classic Era server with TSM integration.

testimonial.text: The custom scanner saved me hours of manual flipping every day. Amazing work!
testimonial.author: GoldMasterX

title: Custom Raid Frame Addon
short_desc: Pixel-perfect, highly optimized raid frames for cutting-edge progression.
features: Dynamic resizing based on group size
example_project: Developed a lightweight alternative to Grid2 for a top 50 World First guild.

testimonial.text: Our healers noticed a 15% FPS increase during huge AoE phases thanks to this code.
testimonial.author: Guild Master, Mythic Raiding Guild

title: Arena Target Tracker Addon
short_desc: Track enemy cooldowns, diminishing returns, and interrupt history in real-time.
features: Custom voice alerts for major CDs
example_project: Created a custom PvP tracker for a multi-Rank 1 Gladiator team.

testimonial.text: Having exactly the info we need without the screen clutter gave us a massive edge.
testimonial.author: Multi-R1 Gladiator

title: Guild Bank & Roster Tracker
short_desc: Automate your guild's economy, attendance, and loot distribution.
example_project: Built a full Discord-to-WoW sync tool for a massive casual guild.

testimonial.text: Managing our guild bank used to take hours. Now it takes 5 minutes.
testimonial.author: Officer, Mega Guild

title: Bag Management Addon Development
short_desc: Smart sorting, auto-vendoring, and cross-character inventory tracking.
example_project: Developed an incredibly lightweight bag replacement focusing on speed.

testimonial.text: Finally, a bag addon that doesn't freeze the game when I open it.
testimonial.author: Altoholic Player
